_comment: Machine-readable batch tracker. Update after each session.

blog.cannibalisation_note: security-driver-sao-paulo dropped from Batch 8 — duplicate of /security-drivers/sao-paulo/ service page built in Phase 3C Block 2. Do not blog topics already covered by Phase 3C deep pages.

event-security.note: All 10 priority cities covered. Total event-security silo now 18 cities.

pages._count_note: 350 non-index content .md files + 6 root pages + section indexes (~367 Hugo pages). Reconciled 2026-06-03 from the actual content tree; prior 261 was stale.

engine_alignment.4_internal_link_graph: DONE (floor) - 2026-06-04: every audited page now carries >=2 descriptive-anchor prose links. Country hubs, event-security, risk-assessments, guides, services, all cities and 54 thematic blog articles prose-linked. 161 link-floor warnings cleared. NOTE: link/QA scripts count only prose body links, not template-rendered front-matter city/service links. Backlink strategy + top-inbound rebalancing remain as future refinement.
engine_alignment.5_qa_seo_quality_gate: GREEN - 2026-06-04: qa_audit.py reports 0 errors AND 0 warnings across 304 audited pages. Stage 2L error pass (03 Jun) plus full warning remediation (04 Jun): all internal-link floors, FAQ floors (city + 67 blog articles), title-length and description-length warnings cleared. check_titles still flags 2 duplicate titles (uk/united-kingdom, usa/united-states country pages) for later canonical resolution.

cannibalisation_rule: Do not blog on topics already covered by Phase 3C service x city deep pages. The deep pages ARE the definitive content for bodyguard-hire/{city}, security-drivers/{city}, executive-protection/{city}, residential-security/{city}. Blog articles on these topics should cover angles the deep pages do not: cost breakdowns, regulatory explainers, comparison pieces, question-led safety guides.

thin_city_expansion.note: All cities that were at 3 FAQs expanded to full depth (5 FAQs, 4+ body sections, 2+ prose links) across batches 2-10. Cleared FAQ-floor warnings for those cities.

next_stage: QA gate fully green (0 errors, 0 warnings). Next candidates: (1) resolve the 2 duplicate country pages (uk/united-kingdom, usa/united-states) via canonical or redirect; (2) Stage 2J refinement - top-inbound link rebalancing and a backlink strategy doc; (3) blog factory continuation through the keyword matrix; (4) revisit the keep-or-redeploy decision per the replication study.
